which grippers i can add on this

**AL Series Robot Arm — Gripper & End Effector Options**

The **AL Series cobots** support a wide range of end effectors and grippers for diverse applications, including beverage/item handling for vending scenarios.

**Available Gripper Types:**

• **Electric Grippers** — Precise, controlled grip for delicate items (cups, bottles, cans)
• **Pneumatic Grippers** — Fast-acting for high-speed repetitive tasks
• **Vacuum Grippers** — Ideal for smooth surfaces (cups, containers, packaging)
• **Custom End Effectors** — Specialized solutions designed for your specific use case

**Additional Accessories:**

• **Tool Changers** — Automatic switching between grippers for multi-task automation
• **Force & Torque Sensors** — Enable force-controlled gripping (prevents crushing cups or spilling)
• **Vision Systems** — Camera integration for object detection and positioning
• **Mounting Solutions** — Flexible floor, wall, or custom installations

**For a Coffee/Beverage Vending Setup:**

A **vacuum or electric gripper** paired with a **force/torque sensor** would be ideal — they provide gentle, reliable handling without damaging cups or spilling contents.

**Which AL Model?**
The payload determines cup/beverage capacity — ranging from **AL3e (3 kg)** to **AL30 (35 kg)** depending on your application.

For custom gripper recommendations and integration details, reach out to our team:

[📞 Contact Allbotix](https://www.allbotix.ai/contact)

expain me how this robot arm can gives coffee to cutomers and how much weight this robot can lift

**AL Series Robot Arm — Coffee Vending Application**

Here's how an **AL Series cobot** can serve coffee to customers and its lifting capacity:

---

**How It Works:**

1. **Customer Order** — Orders placed via touchscreen or app
2. **Arm Movement** — Robot arm reaches pre-programmed locations (cup dispenser, coffee machine, serving counter)
3. **Gripper Pickup** — Electric or vacuum gripper gently grabs filled cup
4. **Delivery** — Arm extends to customer at counter or designated pickup point
5. **Release** — Gripper opens, customer receives coffee safely

**Force Control** — Built-in force/torque sensors prevent spilling or crushing cups during handling.

---

**Weight Lifting Capacity — AL Series Options:**

| Model | Payload | Best For |
|-------|---------|----------|
| **AL3e** | 3 kg | Single cups, light beverages |
| **AL7e** | 7.5 kg | Multiple cups or larger containers |
| **AL12e** | 12.5 kg | Trays with multiple drinks |
| **AL16e** | 16 kg | Heavy dispensers or multi-item service |
| **AL30** | 35 kg | Industrial-scale beverage systems |

**For a coffee vending setup**, an **AL7e (7.5 kg)** or **AL12e (12.5 kg)** is ideal — handles cups, dispensers, and multi-drink trays comfortably.

For custom integration, gripper selection, and installation in your medium-sized space, contact our team:

[📞 Contact Allbotix](https://www.allbotix.ai/contact)

[Visit Allbotix](https://www.allbotix.ai/)
